name: SHED
description: $SHED is a community-driven meme coin built on the Solana blockchain, created specifically for the shed building industry. The token was launched in December 2024 by the founder of Shed Suite, a B2B SaaS platform that serves over 3000 shed dealers across North America. Unlike typical meme coins created by anonymous developers, $SHED was founded by someone with 17 years of experience in the shed building industry, starting as a builder in 2007 and progressing through dealer and manufacturer roles before creating software for the industry. The token has a total supply of 1 billion, with 50% allocated to liquidity, 30% reserved for industry worker airdrops, 10% for the team, and 10% for marketing purposes. $SHED is tradeable on Jupiter and Raydium decentralized exchanges.
